executives.name: Darwin Green
executives.background: Mr. Green is the President and CEO of HighGold Mining Inc. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration and project development.

tenure_dates.title: Founder, President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
